narrative:
Lynn (precinct in Hardin County) has 359 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.9 percentage points.
